description_long: This armchair features a tall, slightly reclined backrest and a deep seat, both covered in a textured, dark fur-like upholstery with subtle color variations. The frame, including the armrests and legs, appears to be crafted from a light-colored, organic-looking wood with a natural, slightly irregular finish. The armrests are gently curved and seamlessly integrated into the frame, providing ergonomic support. The back of the chair reveals a simple wooden support structure, with the upholstery wrapping around the front and seat. The overall silhouette is elegant and modern, with a blend of rustic and contemporary design elements. This armchair would be suitable for outdoor urban spaces such as parks, patios, or stylish public seating areas.
description: A tall, fur-upholstered armchair with a light wooden frame and curved armrests, blending rustic and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, fur-textured backrest, deep seat, and curved wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the reclined backrest, the organic curve of the armrests, and the slender wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the simple wooden support structure and the back of the upholstery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the continuous curve of the backrest and the open space beneath the seat.
attribute_armrest_design: curved, light wooden armrests integrated with the frame
attribute_backrest_style: tall, slightly reclined, continuous with seat, fur-upholstered
attribute_leg_type: slender, slightly irregular light wooden legs
attribute_upholstery_pattern: dark fur-like textured upholstery with subtle color variation
